```{r demographics11, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis'}
library(dplyr)
library(forcats)
library(gtsummary)
library(tidyr)

# -----------------------------
# 1. Recode demographics & comorbidities
# -----------------------------
BISC <- BISC %>%
  mutate(
    across(
      all_of(c(
        "qm23_high_bp_12w_m","qm23_dyslip_12w_m","qm23_diab1_12w_m","qm23_diab2_12w_m",
        "qm23_isch_12w_m","qm23_struc_12w_m","qm23_stroke_12w_m",
        "qm23_kidney_12w_m","qm23_coag_12w_m","qm23_thromb_12w_m",
        "qm23_urin_12w_m","qm23_thyroid_12w_m","qm23_autoimm_12w_m",
        "qm23_asthma_12w_m","qm23_rhini_12w_m","qm23_derma_12w_m",
        "qm23_migr_12w_m","qm23_epil_12w_m","qm23_tumour_12w_m",
        "qm23_psych_12w_m","qm23_digest_12w_m","qm23_others_12w_m"
      )),
      ~ factor(ifelse(.x == "I don't know", NA, .x),
               levels = c("Yes","No"))
    ),
    hosp_recruit_m_12w = fct_infreq(factor(
      case_when(
        substr(id_bisc, 1, 2) == "10" ~ "SP: Hospital de Sant Pau",
        substr(id_bisc, 1, 2) == "11" ~ "MT: Hospital Clínic Maternitat",
        substr(id_bisc, 1, 2) == "12" ~ "SJD: Hospital Sant Joan de Déu",
        TRUE ~ "Other"
      ),
      levels = c("SP: Hospital de Sant Pau","MT: Hospital Clínic Maternitat","SJD: Hospital Sant Joan de Déu","Other")
    ))
  )
BISC <- BISC %>%
  mutate(
    parity_m_2cat = factor(parity_m_2cat),
    parity_m = as.numeric(parity_m)
  )


BISC <- BISC %>%
  mutate(
    # ensure clean factor for genotype table
    APOE_genotype = factor(APOE_genotype),

    # convert carrier to labelled factor for table
    APOE_e4_carrier = factor(
      APOE_e4_carrier,
      levels = c(0, 1),
      labels = c("Non-carrier", "ε4 carrier")
    )
  )

# -----------------------------
# 2. Define variable groups
# -----------------------------
demographics_vars <- c(
  "age_12w_m","bmi_m_12w","educ_level_m_2cat",
  "ethnicity_m_2cat","hosp_recruit_m_12w",
  "parity_m_2cat","parity_m",
  "APOE_genotype",
  "APOE_e4_carrier"
)
comorbidities_vars <- c(
  "qm23_high_bp_12w_m","qm23_dyslip_12w_m","qm23_diab1_12w_m","qm23_diab2_12w_m",
  "qm23_isch_12w_m","qm23_struc_12w_m","qm23_stroke_12w_m",
  "qm23_kidney_12w_m","qm23_coag_12w_m","qm23_thromb_12w_m",
  "qm23_urin_12w_m","qm23_thyroid_12w_m","qm23_autoimm_12w_m",
  "qm23_asthma_12w_m","qm23_rhini_12w_m","qm23_derma_12w_m",
  "qm23_migr_12w_m","qm23_epil_12w_m","qm23_tumour_12w_m",
  "qm23_psych_12w_m","qm23_digest_12w_m","qm23_others_12w_m"
)

# -----------------------------
# 3. Labels
# -----------------------------
labels_demo <- list(
  age_12w_m = "Age",
  bmi_m_12w = "BMI",
  educ_level_m_2cat = "Education",
  ethnicity_m_2cat = "Ethnicity",
  hosp_recruit_m_12w = "Hospital of recruitment",
  parity_m_2cat = "Parity (nulliparous / multiparous)",
  parity_m = "Number of previous births (>22 weeks)",
  APOE_genotype = "APOE genotype",
  APOE_e4_carrier = "APOE e4 carrier"
)

labels_comorb_total <- list(
  qm23_high_bp_12w_m = "Arterial hypertension",
  qm23_dyslip_12w_m = "Dyslipemia",
  qm23_diab1_12w_m = "Diabetes type 1",
  qm23_diab2_12w_m = "Diabetes type 2",
  qm23_isch_12w_m = "Ischemic disease",
  qm23_struc_12w_m = "Structural heart disease",
  qm23_stroke_12w_m = "Stroke",
  qm23_kidney_12w_m = "Chronic kidney disease",
  qm23_coag_12w_m = "Clotting disorders",
  qm23_thromb_12w_m = "History of thrombosis",
  qm23_urin_12w_m = "Urinary tract pathology",
  qm23_thyroid_12w_m = "Thyroid disorders",
  qm23_autoimm_12w_m = "Autoimmune diseases",
  qm23_asthma_12w_m = "Asthma",
  qm23_rhini_12w_m = "Allergic rhinitis",
  qm23_derma_12w_m = "Atopic dermatitis",
  qm23_migr_12w_m = "Migraine",
  qm23_epil_12w_m = "Epilepsy",
  qm23_tumour_12w_m = "Tumors",
  qm23_psych_12w_m = "Psychiatric pathology",
  qm23_digest_12w_m = "Digestive problems",
  qm23_others_12w_m = "Other comorbidities"
)

# -----------------------------
# 4. Create tables separately
# -----------------------------
tbl_demo <- tbl_summary(
  data = BISC,
  include = demographics_vars,
  label = labels_demo,
  statistic = list(
    all_continuous() ~ "{median} ({p25}, {p75})",
    all_categorical() ~ "{n} ({p}%)"
  ),
  missing = "no"
) %>%
  add_n() %>%
  modify_header(stat_0 = "**Participants**") %>%
  bold_labels() %>%
  modify_caption("Table: Mother characteristics (12 weeks)")

tbl_comorb <- tbl_summary(
  data = BISC,
  include = comorbidities_vars,
  label = labels_comorb_total,
  statistic = all_categorical() ~ "{n} ({p}%)",
  missing = "no"
) %>%
  add_n() %>%
  modify_header(stat_0 = "**Participants**") %>%
  bold_labels() %>%
  modify_caption("Table: Mother Comorbidities (pre-pregnancy)")

# -----------------------------
# 5. Medication table preparation
# -----------------------------
med_flags <- BISC_long %>%
  mutate(taken = 1) %>%
  select(id_bisc, med_group, taken) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = med_group, values_from = taken, values_fill = 0) %>%
  mutate(across(-id_bisc, ~factor(., levels = c(0,1), labels = c("No", "Yes"))))

# Optional reorder
med_order <- c(
  "NSAIDs / Analgesics",
  "Psychotropics / Antidepressants / Anxiolytics",
  "Folic Acid / Vitamins / Supplements",
  "Respiratory / Mucolytics",
  "Antibiotics / Antimicrobials",
  "Hormones / Fertility",
  "Antihistamines / Allergy",
  "Cardiovascular / Anticoagulants",
  "Corticosteroids",
  "Other / Miscellaneous"
)
med_flags <- med_flags %>% select(id_bisc, any_of(med_order))

tbl_medications <- tbl_summary(
  data = med_flags,
  include = -id_bisc,
  statistic = all_categorical() ~ "{n} ({p}%)",
  missing = "no"
) %>%
  add_n() %>%
  modify_header(stat_0 = "**Participants**") %>%
  bold_labels() %>%
  modify_caption("Table: Participants taking at least one medication per group (12 weeks)")


## Mother Demographics
tbl_demo
```

### 1.2. Comorbidities (pre-pregnancy) {.tabset}

```{r comorbidities, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis'}
## Mother Comorbidities
tbl_comorb
```

### 1.3. Medication {.tabset}

```{r medication, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis'}
## Medication at 12 weeks
tbl_medications
```

### 1.4. Birth and covid {.tabset}

```{r birthcharacteristics, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis'}
library(dplyr)
library(gtsummary)
library(forcats)

# -----------------------------
# 1. Define variables & labels
# -----------------------------
birth_vars <- c(
  "delivery_type", 
  "sex_0y_c", 
  "gestage_0y_c_days",
  "hospital_delivery",        
  "covid_frontier_m_3c",
  
  "covid_m2_mother",
  "covid_m2_child",
  "covid_m6_mother",
  "covid_m6_child",
  "covid_m12_mother",
  "covid_m12_child",
  "covid_m18_mother",
  "covid_m18_child"
)

labels_list_birth <- list(
  delivery_type = "Delivery type",
  sex_0y_c = "Sex of child",
  gestage_0y_c_days = "Gestational age at birth (days)",
  hospital_delivery = "Delivery hospital",
  covid_frontier_m_3c = "COVID group (FRONTIER)",
  
  covid_m2_mother = "COVID infection mother (2 months after birth)",
  covid_m2_child = "COVID infection child (2 months after birth)",
  covid_m6_mother = "COVID infection mother (6 months after birth)",
  covid_m6_child = "COVID infection child (6 months after birth)",
  covid_m12_mother = "COVID infection mother (12 months after birth)",
  covid_m12_child = "COVID infection child (12 months after birth)",
  covid_m18_mother = "COVID infection mother (18 months after birth)",
  covid_m18_child = "COVID infection child (18 months after birth)"
)

# -----------------------------
# 2. Standardize variables
# -----------------------------
BISC_birth <- BISC %>%
  mutate(
    delivery_type = factor(delivery_type,
                           levels = c("Eutocic","Instrumented","Caesarean section")),
    
    sex_0y_c = factor(sex_0y_c,
                      levels = c("Boy","Girl")),
    
    hospital_delivery = fct_infreq(factor(hospital_delivery,
                                          levels = c("HSjD","Maternitat","HSPau","Home","Other"))),
    
    # Keep the original values but create a display label for the table
    covid_frontier_m_3c = factor(
      covid_frontier_m_3c,
      levels = c("Group 1","Group 2","Group 3"),
      labels = c(
        "Group 1: Delivery date before 14/03/2020",
        "Group 2: Date of Last Menstruation before 14/03/2020 AND Delivery after 14/03/2020 or same day",
        "Group 3: Date of Last Menstruation after 14/03/2020 or same day"
      )
    ),
    covid_m2_mother = factor(covid_m2_mother, levels = c(0,1), labels = c("No", "Yes")),
covid_m2_child  = factor(covid_m2_child,  levels = c(0,1), labels = c("No", "Yes")),
covid_m6_mother = factor(covid_m6_mother, levels = c(0,1), labels = c("No", "Yes")),
covid_m6_child  = factor(covid_m6_child,  levels = c(0,1), labels = c("No", "Yes")),
covid_m12_mother = factor(covid_m12_mother, levels = c(0,1), labels = c("No", "Yes")),
covid_m12_child  = factor(covid_m12_child,  levels = c(0,1), labels = c("No", "Yes")),
covid_m18_mother = factor(covid_m18_mother, levels = c(0,1), labels = c("No", "Yes")),
covid_m18_child  = factor(covid_m18_child,  levels = c(0,1), labels = c("No", "Yes"))
  )

# -----------------------------
# 3. Table
# -----------------------------
tbl_birth <- tbl_summary(
  data = BISC_birth,
  include = all_of(birth_vars),
  label = labels_list_birth,
  statistic = list(
    all_continuous() ~ "{median} ({p25}, {p75})",
    all_categorical() ~ "{n} ({p}%)"
  ),
  missing = "no"
) %>%
  add_n() %>%
  modify_header(stat_0 = "**Participants**") %>%
  bold_labels() %>%
  modify_caption("Table: Birth characteristics including hospital and COVID (y0+)")

# -----------------------------
# 4. Render
# -----------------------------
tbl_birth
```

### 1.5. Pregnancy {.tabset}

```{r pregnancy, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis'}

library(dplyr)
library(gtsummary)

# -----------------------------
# 0. Standardize additional health variables
# -----------------------------
BISC <- BISC %>%
  mutate(
    qm1_health_prepreg_12w_m = factor(qm1_health_prepreg_12w_m,
                                       levels = c("Excellent","Very good","Good","Moderate","Bad")),
    qm1_health_m1preg_12w_m = factor(qm1_health_m1preg_12w_m,
                                     levels = c("Excellent","Very good","Good","Moderate","Bad")),
    qm1_health_last2wpreg_12w_m = factor(qm1_health_last2wpreg_12w_m,
                                         levels = c("Excellent","Very good","Good","Moderate","Bad")),
    qm2_weight_birth_12w_m = factor(qm2_weight_birth_12w_m,
                                    levels = c("<2000g","2000-2500g","2500-4000g",">4000g","I don't know")),
    qm3_premature_12w_m = factor(qm3_premature_12w_m,
                                 levels = c("Yes","No","I don't know")),
    qm4_medicines_12w_m = factor(qm4_medicines_12w_m,
                                 levels = c("Yes","No")),

    # Standardize pregnancy complications
    pe_onset_m_2cat = factor(
      pe_onset_m_2cat,
      levels = c("no_pe","pe_early","pe_late"),
      labels = c(
        "No preeclampsia",
        "Early preeclampsia (<34 weeks)",
        "Late preeclampsia (≥34 weeks)"
      )
    ),
    pe_term_m_2cat = factor(
      pe_term_m_2cat,
      levels = c("no_pe","pe_term","pe_preterm","pe_v_preterm"),
      labels = c(
        "No preeclampsia",
        "Term preeclampsia (>37 weeks)",
        "Preterm preeclampsia (34–37 weeks)",
        "Very preterm preeclampsia (<34 weeks)"
      )
    ),
    across(c(C_DG, C_hel, C_hip, C_pree, C_peeg,
             hdp_denovo_m, pe_total_m),
           ~ factor(.x))
  )

# -----------------------------
# 1. Variables and labels
# -----------------------------
additional_health_vars <- c(
  "qm1_health_prepreg_12w_m",
  "qm1_health_m1preg_12w_m",
  "qm1_health_last2wpreg_12w_m",
  "qm2_weight_birth_12w_m",
  "qm3_premature_12w_m",
  "qm4_medicines_12w_m"
)

pregnancy_comp_vars <- c(
  "C_DG","C_hel","C_hip","C_pree","C_peeg",
  "hdp_denovo_m","pe_total_m","pe_onset_m_2cat","pe_term_m_2cat"
)

labels_additional <- list(
  qm1_health_prepreg_12w_m = "Self-rated health: Before pregnancy",
  qm1_health_m1preg_12w_m = "Self-rated health: First month of pregnancy",
  qm1_health_last2wpreg_12w_m = "Self-rated health: Last 2 weeks of pregnancy",
  qm2_weight_birth_12w_m = "Mother's birth weight",
  qm3_premature_12w_m = "Mother was a preterm birth",
  qm4_medicines_12w_m = "Medication use 3 months prior to pregnancy"
)

labels_pregnancy <- list(
  C_DG = "Gestational diabetes",
  C_hel = "HELLP syndrome",
  C_hip = "Gestational hypertension",
  C_pree = "Mild preeclampsia",
  C_peeg = "Severe preeclampsia",
  hdp_denovo_m = "Hypertensive disorders of pregnancy (de novo onset)",
  pe_total_m = "Presence of preeclampsia (any type)",
  pe_onset_m_2cat = "Preeclampsia onset classification",
  pe_term_m_2cat = "Preeclampsia classification by gestational age at birth"
)

# -----------------------------
# 2. Create tables
# -----------------------------
tbl_health <- tbl_summary(
  data = BISC,
  include = additional_health_vars,
  label = labels_additional,
  statistic = all_categorical() ~ "{n} ({p}%)",
  missing = "no"
) %>%
  add_n() %>%
  bold_labels()

tbl_pregnancy <- tbl_summary(
  data = BISC,
  include = pregnancy_comp_vars,
  label = labels_pregnancy,
  statistic = all_categorical() ~ "{n} ({p}%)",
  missing = "no"
) %>%
  add_n() %>%
  bold_labels()

# -----------------------------
# 3. Stack tables into single column
# -----------------------------
tbl_combined <- tbl_stack(
  tbls = list(tbl_health, tbl_pregnancy),
  group_header = c("----------------------------------------------- Mother Health -----------------------------------------------",
                   "----------------------------------------- Pregnancy Complications -----------------------------------------")
) %>%
  modify_header(stat_0 = "**Participants**") %>%
  modify_caption("Table: Mother Self-rated Health and Pregnancy Complications")

# -----------------------------
# 4. Render table
# -----------------------------
tbl_combined
```

### 1.6. SCL90-R {.tabset}

```{r scl90, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis'}
library(dplyr)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)

# -----------------------------
# Domains
# -----------------------------
domains <- c(
  "som","obs","si","dep","ans","hos",
  "fob","par","psic","igs","tsp","imsp"
)

labels_items <- c(
  som="Somatization",
  obs="Obsessive–compulsive",
  si="Interpersonal sensitivity",
  dep="Depression",
  ans="Anxiety",
  hos="Hostility",
  fob="Phobic anxiety",
  par="Paranoid ideation",
  psic="Psychoticism",
  igs="Global Severity Index",
  tsp="Positive Symptoms Total",
  imsp="Positive Symptom Distress Index"
)

# -----------------------------
# SAFE RECODER (ONLY FOR PARTNER IF NEEDED)
# -----------------------------
to_binary <- function(x){
  dplyr::case_when(
    x == "At risk" ~ 1,
    x == "Not at risk" ~ 0,
    x %in% c("NA","",NA) ~ NA_real_,
    TRUE ~ NA_real_
  )
}

# -----------------------------
# APPLY ONLY TO PARTNER (already character)
# -----------------------------
p_cols <- paste0("scl90r_T_", domains, "_p_48m")
BISC[p_cols] <- lapply(BISC[p_cols], to_binary)

# -----------------------------
# HELPER
# -----------------------------
fmt_median_iqr <- function(x){
  x <- as.numeric(x)
  if(all(is.na(x))) return(NA_character_)

  paste0(
    round(median(x, na.rm=TRUE),2),
    " (",
    round(quantile(x,0.25,na.rm=TRUE),2), ", ",
    round(quantile(x,0.75,na.rm=TRUE),2),
    ")"
  )
}

# -----------------------------
# ITEM TABLE
# -----------------------------
y4_item_table <- bind_rows(lapply(domains, function(d){

  m_bin <- BISC[[paste0("T_", d, "_m")]]  # already 0/1 numeric
  p_bin <- BISC[[paste0("scl90r_T_", d, "_p_48m")]]  # now cleaned

  m_cont <- BISC[[paste0(d, "_m")]]  # continuous
  p_cont <- BISC[[paste0(d, "_p")]]  # continuous (if exists)

  data.frame(
    Item = labels_items[d],

    `Y4 Participant (N)` = sum(!is.na(m_bin)),
    `Y4 Partner (N)` = sum(!is.na(p_bin)),

    `Y4 Participant (N at risk)` = sum(m_bin == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    `Y4 Partner (N at risk)` = sum(p_bin == 1, na.rm = TRUE),

    `Y4 Participant (Median score)` = fmt_median_iqr(m_cont),
    `Y4 Partner (Median score)` = fmt_median_iqr(p_cont)
  )
}))

# participant already numeric (0/1)
BISC$scl_total_m_y4 <- rowSums(BISC[paste0("T_", domains, "_m")], na.rm = TRUE)

# partner after recode
BISC$scl_total_p_y4 <- rowSums(BISC[p_cols], na.rm = TRUE)


total_row_y4 <- data.frame(
  Item = "TOTAL SCORE",

  `Y4 Participant (N)` = sum(!is.na(BISC$scl_total_m_y4)),
  `Y4 Partner (N)` = sum(!is.na(BISC$scl_total_p_y4)),

  `Y4 Participant (N at risk)` = sum(BISC$scl_total_m_y4, na.rm = TRUE),
  `Y4 Partner (N at risk)` = sum(BISC$scl_total_p_y4, na.rm = TRUE),

  `Y4 Participant (Median score)` = fmt_median_iqr(BISC$scl_total_m_y4),
  `Y4 Partner (Median score)` = fmt_median_iqr(BISC$scl_total_p_y4)
)

scl90_y4_final <- bind_rows(y4_item_table, total_row_y4)
names(scl90_y4_final) <- c(
  "Item",
  "Y4 Participant (N)",
  "Y4 Partner (N)",
  "Y4 Participant (N at risk)",
  "Y4 Partner (N at risk)",
  "Y4 Participant (Median score)",
  "Y4 Partner (Median score)"
)


scl90_y4_final %>%
  kable(
    "html",
    caption = "SCL-90-R Summary (Y4, 48 months): Participant vs Partner",
    row.names = FALSE
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(
    full_width = FALSE,
    bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover")
  )
```
```{r scl90_plots_final, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis', fig.width=16, fig.height=12}

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(irr)

# =========================================================
# 0. DOMAINS
# =========================================================

items <- c(
  "som","obs","si","dep","ans","hos",
  "fob","par","psic",
  "igs","tsp","imsp"
)

labels_items <- c(
  som="Somatization",
  obs="Obsessive–compulsive",
  si="Interpersonal sensitivity",
  dep="Depression",
  ans="Anxiety",
  hos="Hostility",
  fob="Phobic anxiety",
  par="Paranoid ideation",
  psic="Psychoticism",
  igs="Global Severity Index",
  tsp="Positive Symptoms Total",
  imsp="Positive Symptom Distress Index"
)

# =========================================================
# 1. SAFE NUMERIC CONVERSION (ALL RAW SCORES)
# =========================================================

BISC <- BISC %>%
  mutate(across(matches("^scl90r_.*_m_48m$|^scl90r_.*_p_48m$"),
                ~ as.numeric(as.character(.x))))

# =========================================================
# 2. HELPER FUNCTIONS
# =========================================================

make_corr_plot <- function(df, title) {

  r <- cor(df$mother, df$partner, use = "complete.obs")

  ggplot(df, aes(mother, partner)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.6, size = 1.5) +
    geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "black") +
    labs(title = title,
         subtitle = paste0("r = ", round(r, 2)),
         x = NULL, y = NULL) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11)
}

make_kappa_heatmap <- function(df, title) {

  if (nrow(df) < 5) return(NULL)

  kappa <- irr::kappa2(df)$value

  tab <- as.data.frame(table(df$m, df$p))
  colnames(tab) <- c("Mother","Partner","n")

  ggplot(tab, aes(Mother, Partner, fill = n)) +
    geom_tile(color = "white") +
    geom_text(aes(label = n), size = 5) +
    scale_fill_gradient(low = "white", high = "steelblue") +
    labs(title = title,
         subtitle = paste0("κ = ", round(kappa, 2)),
         x = "Mother (0/1)", y = "Partner (0/1)") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank())
}

# =========================================================
# 3. 20W NUMERIC AGREEMENT
# =========================================================

plots_20w <- list()

for (i in items) {

  df <- BISC %>%
    transmute(
      mother = .data[[paste0(i, "_m")]],
      partner = .data[[paste0(i, "_p")]]
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(mother) & !is.na(partner))

  plots_20w[[i]] <- make_corr_plot(df, labels_items[i])
}

# TOTAL 20W
df_tot_20w <- BISC %>%
  transmute(mother = scl_total_m_20w,
            partner = scl_total_p_20w) %>%
  filter(!is.na(mother) & !is.na(partner))

plots_20w[["TOTAL"]] <- make_corr_plot(df_tot_20w, "TOTAL (20w)")

fig_20w_num <- wrap_plots(plots_20w, ncol = 4)

# =========================================================
# 4. 20W CATEGORICAL AGREEMENT
# =========================================================

plots_20w_cat <- list()

for (i in items) {

  df <- BISC %>%
    transmute(
      m = .data[[paste0("T_", i, "_m")]],
      p = .data[[paste0("T_", i, "_p")]]
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(m) & !is.na(p)) %>%
    mutate(across(everything(), as.factor))

  plots_20w_cat[[i]] <- make_kappa_heatmap(df, labels_items[i])
}

fig_20w_cat <- wrap_plots(plots_20w_cat, ncol = 4)

# =========================================================
# 5. Y4 NUMERIC AGREEMENT
# =========================================================

y4_m <- c(
  som="scl90r_som_m_48m", obs="scl90r_obs_m_48m",
  si="scl90r_si_m_48m", dep="scl90r_dep_m_48m",
  ans="scl90r_ans_m_48m", hos="scl90r_hos_m_48m",
  fob="scl90r_fob_m_48m", par="scl90r_par_m_48m",
  psic="scl90r_psic_m_48m", igs="scl90r_igs_m_48m",
  tsp="scl90r_tsp_m_48m", imsp="scl90r_imsp_m_48m"
)

y4_p <- c(
  som="scl90r_som_p_48m", obs="scl90r_obs_p_48m",
  si="scl90r_si_p_48m", dep="scl90r_dep_p_48m",
  ans="scl90r_ans_p_48m", hos="scl90r_hos_p_48m",
  fob="scl90r_fob_p_48m", par="scl90r_par_p_48m",
  psic="scl90r_psic_p_48m", igs="scl90r_igs_p_48m",
  tsp="scl90r_tsp_p_48m", imsp="scl90r_imsp_p_48m"
)

plots_y4 <- list()

for (i in items) {

  df <- BISC %>%
    transmute(
      mother = .data[[y4_m[i]]],
      partner = .data[[y4_p[i]]]
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(mother) & !is.na(partner))

  plots_y4[[i]] <- make_corr_plot(df, paste0(labels_items[i], " (Y4)"))
}

# TOTAL Y4
BISC <- BISC %>%
  mutate(
    y4_total_m = rowSums(across(all_of(unname(y4_m))), na.rm = TRUE),
    y4_total_p = rowSums(across(all_of(unname(y4_p))), na.rm = TRUE)
  )

df_tot_y4 <- BISC %>%
  transmute(mother = y4_total_m,
            partner = y4_total_p) %>%
  filter(!is.na(mother) & !is.na(partner))

plots_y4[["TOTAL"]] <- make_corr_plot(df_tot_y4, "TOTAL (Y4)")

fig_y4_num <- wrap_plots(plots_y4, ncol = 4)

# =========================================================
# Y4 CATEGORICAL AGREEMENT (USING T_ RISK VARIABLES)
# =========================================================

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

plots_y4_cat <- list()

missing_items <- c()

for (i in items) {

  var_m <- paste0("scl90r_T_", i, "_m_48m")
  var_p <- paste0("scl90r_T_", i, "_p_48m")

  # ---- CHECK EXISTENCE
  if (!var_m %in% names(BISC) || !var_p %in% names(BISC)) {
    missing_items <- c(missing_items, i)
    next
  }

  df <- BISC %>%
    transmute(
      m = case_when(
        .data[[var_m]] %in% c(1, "1", "At risk") ~ 1,
        .data[[var_m]] %in% c(0, "0", "Not at risk") ~ 0,
        TRUE ~ NA_real_
      ),
      p = case_when(
        .data[[var_p]] %in% c(1, "1", "At risk") ~ 1,
        .data[[var_p]] %in% c(0, "0", "Not at risk") ~ 0,
        TRUE ~ NA_real_
      )
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(m) & !is.na(p))

  # ---- SKIP EMPTY
  if (nrow(df) == 0) next

  df$m <- factor(df$m, levels = c(0,1))
  df$p <- factor(df$p, levels = c(0,1))

  tab <- as.data.frame(table(df$m, df$p))
  colnames(tab) <- c("Mother","Partner","n")

  kappa <- tryCatch(
    irr::kappa2(df)$value,
    error = function(e) NA
  )

  plots_y4_cat[[i]] <- ggplot(tab, aes(Mother, Partner, fill = n)) +
    geom_tile(color = "white") +
    geom_text(aes(label = n), size = 5) +
    scale_fill_gradient(low = "white", high = "steelblue") +
    labs(
      title = labels_items[i],
      subtitle = paste0("κ = ", round(kappa, 2)),
      x = "Mother (0/1)", y = "Partner (0/1)"
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank())
}

# -----------------------------
# SAFE OUTPUT
# -----------------------------
if (length(plots_y4_cat) == 0) {

  cat("❌ No Y4 categorical plots were generated.\n")

  cat("\n🔍 Missing or problematic items:\n")
  print(missing_items)

} else {

  fig_y4_cat <- patchwork::wrap_plots(plots_y4_cat, ncol = 4)
}

# =========================================================
# OUTPUT
# =========================================================

print("20w numerical agreement")
fig_20w_num

print("20w categorical agreement")
fig_20w_cat

print("Y4 numerical agreement")
fig_y4_num

print("Y4 categorical agreement")
fig_y4_cat
```

### 1.7. ADHD {.tabset}

```{r adhd_sidebyside, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis'}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)

# Define items
adhd_items <- data.frame(
  item = c("Total score", "Inattention subscale", "Hyperactive-impulsive subscale"),
  mother_var = c("adhd_rs_totalscore_m_48m", "adhd_rs_ia_subscore_m_48m", "adhd_rs_hi_subscore_m_48m"),
  partner_var = c("adhd_rs_totalscore_p_48m", "adhd_rs_ia_subscore_p_48m", "adhd_rs_hi_subscore_p_48m")
)

# Compute medians & IQRs for mother and partner
adhd_summary <- adhd_items %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    N_participant = sum(!is.na(BISC[[mother_var]])),
    N_partner = sum(!is.na(BISC[[partner_var]])),

    Participant = paste0(
      median(BISC[[mother_var]], na.rm=TRUE), " (",
      quantile(BISC[[mother_var]], 0.25, na.rm=TRUE), ", ",
      quantile(BISC[[mother_var]], 0.75, na.rm=TRUE), ")"
    ),
    Partner = paste0(
      median(BISC[[partner_var]], na.rm=TRUE), " (",
      quantile(BISC[[partner_var]], 0.25, na.rm=TRUE), ", ",
      quantile(BISC[[partner_var]], 0.75, na.rm=TRUE), ")"
    )
  ) %>%
  select(Item = item,
         `Participant (N)` = N_participant,
         `Participant (median)` = Participant,
         `Partner (N)` = N_partner,
         `Partner (median)` = Partner)

# Render table nicely
adhd_summary %>%
  kable("html", caption = "Table: Attention-deficit/hyperactivity disorder (ADHD) Rating Scale - Participant vs Partner reports at 48 months (y4). Total N and Median (Q1, Q3) are represented.") %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = FALSE, bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"))
```
```{r adhd_plots, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis',  fig.width=20, fig.height=14}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

labels <- c(
  "Details",        # 1
  "Fidget",         # 2
  "Sustain",        # 3
  "LeaveSeat",      # 4
  "Listen",         # 5
  "Restless",       # 6
  "FollowUp",       # 7
  "Quiet",          # 8
  "Organize",       # 9
  "Driven",         # 10
  "Effort",         # 11
  "Talk",           # 12
  "Lose",           # 13
  "Impulse",        # 14
  "Distract",       # 15
  "Wait",           # 16
  "Forget",         # 17
  "Interrupt"       # 18
)

# ---------------------------
# 1. Variable lists (FIXED)
# ---------------------------
mother_items <- c(
  "adhd_rs_q1_ia_det_err_m_48m",
  "adhd_rs_q2_hi_fidget_m_48m",
  "adhd_rs_q3_ia_sust_focus_m_48m",
  "adhd_rs_q4_hi_leave_seat_m_48m",
  "adhd_rs_q5_ia_inatt_listen_m_48m",
  "adhd_rs_q6_hi_restless_m_48m",
  "adhd_rs_q7_ia_incomp_work_m_48m",
  "adhd_rs_q8_hi_diff_relax_m_48m",
  "adhd_rs_q9_ia_task_org_m_48m",
  "adhd_rs_q10_hi_motor_drv_m_48m",
  "adhd_rs_q11_ia_avoid_effort_m_48m",
  "adhd_rs_q12_hi_ex_talk_m_48m",
  "adhd_rs_q13_ia_lose_items_m_48m",
  "adhd_rs_q14_hi_prem_ans_m_48m",
  "adhd_rs_q15_ia_distract_m_48m",
  "adhd_rs_q16_hi_diff_wait_m_48m",
  "adhd_rs_q17_ia_forget_m_48m",
  "adhd_rs_q18_hi_interrupt_m_48m"
)

partner_items <- c(
  "adhd_rs_q1_ia_det_err_p_48m",
  "adhd_rs_q2_hi_fidget_p_48m",
  "adhd_rs_q3_ia_sust_focus_p_48m",
  "adhd_rs_q4_hi_leave_seat_p_48m",
  "adhd_rs_q5_ia_inatt_listen_p_48m",
  "adhd_rs_q6_hi_restless_p_48m",
  "adhd_rs_q7_ia_incomp_work_p_48m",
  "adhd_rs_q8_hi_diff_relax_p_48m",
  "adhd_rs_q9_ia_task_org_p_48m",
  "adhd_rs_q10_hi_motor_drv_p_48m",
  "adhd_rs_q11_ia_avoid_effort_p_48m",
  "adhd_rs_q12_hi_ex_talk_p_48m",
  "adhd_rs_q13_ia_lose_items_p_48m",
  "adhd_rs_q14_hi_prem_ans_p_48m",
  "adhd_rs_q15_ia_distract_p_48m",
  "adhd_rs_q16_hi_diff_wait_p_48m",
  "adhd_rs_q17_ia_forget_p_48m",
  "adhd_rs_q18_hi_interrupt_p_48m"
)

# transform numeric
BISC[mother_items] <- lapply(BISC[mother_items], function(x) as.numeric(as.character(x)))
BISC[partner_items] <- lapply(BISC[partner_items], function(x) as.numeric(as.character(x)))

labels <- c(
  "Details","Fidget","Sustain","LeaveSeat","Listen","Restless",
  "FollowUp","Quiet","Organize","Driven","Effort","Talk",
  "Lose","Impulse","Distract","Wait","Forget","Interrupt"
)

# we will plot two groups to allow their inclusion
group1 <- 1:9
group2 <- 10:18

# ---------------------------
# Build dataset (complete cases only)
# ---------------------------

plot_data <- bind_rows(lapply(1:18, function(i) {

  df <- data.frame(
    item = labels[i],
    mother = BISC[[mother_items[i]]],
    partner = BISC[[partner_items[i]]]
  )

  df <- df %>%
    filter(!is.na(mother) & !is.na(partner))

  df
}))

# ---------------------------
# Correlations
# ---------------------------

cors <- sapply(1:18, function(i) {
  cor(BISC[[mother_items[i]]],
      BISC[[partner_items[i]]],
      use = "complete.obs")
})

# ---------------------------
# Plot
# ---------------------------

make_plot <- function(idx) {

  plot_data <- bind_rows(lapply(idx, function(i) {

    data.frame(
      item = labels[i],
      mother = BISC[[mother_items[i]]],
      partner = BISC[[partner_items[i]]]
    ) %>%
      filter(!is.na(mother) & !is.na(partner))
  }))

  ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = mother, y = partner)) +
    geom_jitter(width = 0.2, height = 0.2, alpha = 0.6, size = 2.5) +
    geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0,
                linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
    facet_wrap(~ item, ncol = 3) +   # IMPORTANT: fewer columns = bigger plots
    labs(
      title = "Mother vs Partner Agreement on ADHD Items",
      subtitle = "Red line = perfect agreement (y = x)",
      x = "Mother score (0–3)",
      y = "Partner score (0–3)"
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 18) +
    theme(
      strip.text = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
      axis.text = element_text(size = 14),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 16),
      plot.title = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold")
    )
}

p1 <- make_plot(group1)
p2 <- make_plot(group2)

p1
p2

```

### 1.8. EPDS {.tabset}

```{r epds, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis'}
# -----------------------------
# Load libraries
# -----------------------------
library(dplyr)
library(gtsummary)

# -----------------------------
# 4. EPDS Table
# -----------------------------
labels_epds <- list(
  epds_risk_m_32w_mod = "Risk of depression (EPDS) (prenatal: 32 weeks)",
  epds.risk_m_2m_6c_mod = "Risk of depression (EPDS) (postpartum: 2 months)",
  epds.risk_m_12m_6c_mod = "Risk of depression (EPDS) (postpartum: 12 months)",
  epds.risk_m_18m_6c_mod = "Risk of depression (EPDS) (postpartum: 18 months)"
)

tbl_epds <- tbl_summary(
  data = BISC,
  include = c("epds_risk_m_32w_mod", "epds.risk_m_2m_6c_mod", "epds.risk_m_12m_6c_mod", "epds.risk_m_18m_6c_mod"),
  label = labels_epds,
  statistic = all_categorical() ~ "{n} ({p}%)",
  missing = "no"
) %>%
  add_n() %>%
  modify_header(stat_0 = "**Participants**") %>%
  bold_labels() %>%
  modify_caption("Table: Depression Risk (EPDS) at Different Time Points")

# -----------------------------
# 5. Render tables
# -----------------------------
tbl_epds

```
____________________________________________________________________________________________________________________
```{r epds_trajectories, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis'}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)

# -----------------------------
# 1. Prepare long data
# -----------------------------
epds_long <- BISC %>%
  select(id_bisc, epds.total_m_2m, epds.total_m_12m, epds.total_m_18m, epds_m_28m) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -id_bisc,
    names_to = "time",
    values_to = "epds_score"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    time = factor(
      time,
      levels = c("epds.total_m_2m", "epds.total_m_12m", "epds.total_m_18m", "epds_m_28m"),
      labels = c("2m", "12m", "18m", "28m")
    ),
    time_num = as.numeric(time)
  )

# -----------------------------
# 2. Plot (optimized for discrete scores)
# -----------------------------
ggplot(epds_long, aes(x = time_num, y = epds_score, group = id_bisc)) +
  
  # Individual trajectories
  geom_line(alpha = 0.15, color = "#2C7FB8") +
  
  # Jittered points (avoid overlap)
  geom_point(aes(color = factor(epds_score)),
             position = position_jitter(width = 0.05, height = 0.2),
             alpha = 0.4,
             size = 1.5) +
  
  # Mean trajectory
  stat_summary(aes(group = 1),
               fun = mean,
               geom = "line",
               linewidth = 1.5,
               color = "black") +
  
  stat_summary(aes(group = 1),
               fun = mean,
               geom = "point",
               size = 3,
               color = "black") +
  
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = 1:4,
    labels = c("2m", "12m", "18m", "28m")
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = seq(0, max(epds_long$epds_score, na.rm = TRUE), by = 2)
  ) +
  
  labs(
    title = "EPDS Score Trajectories Over Time",
    x = "Time",
    y = "EPDS Score"
  ) +
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
  )
```

### 1.9. PMA {.tabset}

```{r pma, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis'}
########## Primary mental abilities (PMA)
# -----------------------------
# 2. Compute PMA accuracy
# -----------------------------
BISC <- BISC %>%
  mutate(accuracy_pma = pma_tcorrect_m_32w / (pma_tcorrect_m_32w + pma_twrong_m_32w) * 100)


labels_pma <- list(
  pma_ncycle_m_32w = "Number of cycles done",
  pma_tcorrect_m_32w = "Correct responses",
  pma_twrong_m_32w = "Wrong responses",
  accuracy_pma = "Accuracy (%)"
)

tbl_pma <- tbl_summary(
  data = BISC,
  include = c("pma_ncycle_m_32w", "pma_tcorrect_m_32w", "pma_twrong_m_32w", "accuracy_pma"),
  label = labels_pma,
  statistic = all_continuous() ~ "{median} ({p25}, {p75})",
  missing = "no"
) %>%
  add_n() %>%
  modify_header(stat_0 = "**Participants**") %>%
  bold_labels() %>%
  modify_caption("Table: Primary mental abilities (PMA) performance of the participant (32w)")
tbl_pma
```
____________________________________________________________________________________________________________________

```{r plotpma, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis'}
library(ggplot2)

ggplot(BISC, aes(x = pma_tcorrect_m_32w)) +
  geom_histogram(
    bins = 30,
    fill = "#4C72B0",
    color = "white",
    alpha = 0.9
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of Correct Responses (PMA)",
    x = "Correct responses",
    y = "Count"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )
```


## 2. Analyses {.tabset}

```{r creation of long_df, results='hide', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, include=FALSE}
# Creation of dataset with all variables

# Ensure Visit is a factor in order
biomarkers_wide <- biomarkers_wide %>%
  mutate(Visit = factor(Visit, levels = sort(unique(Visit))))

# Merge datasets, allowing 1 row per unique participant and visit
long_df <- biomarkers_wide %>%
  mutate(Visit = factor(Visit, levels = sort(unique(Visit)))) %>%  # ensure Visit is ordered
  rename(id_bisc = Participant_ID) %>%                             # rename ID for merging
  distinct(id_bisc, Visit, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%                   # one row per participant × visit
  left_join(BISC, by = "id_bisc")                                  # merge covariates

# Check
dim(long_df)
head(long_df)

# Define file path
#file_path <- "C:/Users/U127925/Desktop/FLH/Analyses/External/BISC - 05032026/save_folder/bisc_database_20260401.csv"
# Save long_df
#write.csv(long_df, file = file_path, row.names = FALSE)

##################################################################################
# QUALITY CONTROL OF THE MERGE
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

# -------------------------------
# Step 1: Filled values BEFORE merge
# Combine biomarkers + BISC for "before" counts
# For BISC variables, we count in BISC itself
qc_biomarkers_before <- biomarkers_wide %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), ~sum(!is.na(.)))) %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "variable", values_to = "filled_before") %>%
  mutate(total_before = nrow(biomarkers_wide),
         pct_before = round(filled_before / total_before * 100, 1))

qc_BISC_before <- BISC %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), ~sum(!is.na(.)))) %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "variable", values_to = "filled_before") %>%
  mutate(total_before = nrow(BISC),
         pct_before = round(filled_before / total_before * 100, 1))

qc_before <- bind_rows(qc_biomarkers_before, qc_BISC_before)

# -------------------------------
# Step 2: Filled values AFTER merge (long_df)
qc_after <- long_df %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), ~sum(!is.na(.)))) %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "variable", values_to = "filled_after") %>%
  mutate(total_after = nrow(long_df),
         pct_after = round(filled_after / total_after * 100, 1))

# -------------------------------
# Step 3: Combine before and after
qc_summary <- qc_before %>%
  left_join(qc_after, by = "variable") %>%
  select(variable, filled_before, pct_before, total_before,
         filled_after, pct_after, total_after)

# -------------------------------
# Step 4: Check duplicates: participant × visit
duplicates <- long_df %>%
  group_by(id_bisc, Visit) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  filter(n > 1)

# -------------------------------
# Step 5: Print QC results
cat("Rows before merge (biomarkers):", nrow(biomarkers_wide), "\n")
cat("Rows before merge (BISC):", nrow(BISC), "\n")
cat("Rows after merge (long_df):", nrow(long_df), "\n\n")

cat("Filled values per variable before and after merge:\n")
print(qc_summary)

if(nrow(duplicates) == 0){
  cat("\nPASS: One row per participant × visit.\n")
} else {
  cat("\nWARNING: Duplicates found for participant × visit:\n")
  print(duplicates)
}

```

```{r calculation of GA_weeks, results='hide', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, include=FALSE}
# CALCULATE GESTATIONAL AGE FROM BISC GA AND AGES, AND FIND INCONSISTENCIES
library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)
library(openxlsx)

# =========================================================
# 1. PREP DATA (RAW VARIABLES ONLY)
# =========================================================

BISC_ga_wide <- BISC %>%
  mutate(
    id_bisc = as.character(id_bisc),

    # numeric GA
    bl_gest.age.extr_m_12w = as.numeric(bl_gest.age.extr_m_12w),
    bl_gest.age.extr_m_32w = as.numeric(bl_gest.age.extr_m_32w),
    bl_gest.age.del_m_0y   = as.numeric(bl_gest.age.del_m_0y),
    bl_gest.age.extr_c_0y  = as.numeric(bl_gest.age.extr_c_0y),
    gestage_4y_weeks       = as.numeric(gestage_4y_weeks),

    # dates
    bl_date.extr_m_12w = dmy_hms(bl_date.extr_m_12w),
    bl_date.extr_m_32w = dmy_hms(bl_date.extr_m_32w),
    bl_col.date_m_0y   = dmy_hms(bl_col.date_m_0y),
    extraction_date    = dmy_hms(extraction_date)
  )

# =========================================================
# 2. DEFINE ANCHOR (V3 = BIRTH)
# =========================================================

BISC_ga_wide <- BISC_ga_wide %>%
  mutate(
    ga_v3 = case_when(
      !is.na(bl_gest.age.del_m_0y) ~ bl_gest.age.del_m_0y,
      !is.na(bl_gest.age.extr_c_0y) ~ bl_gest.age.extr_c_0y,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),

    ga_v4 = gestage_4y_weeks
  )

# =========================================================
# 3. TIME DIFFERENCES
# =========================================================

BISC_ga_wide <- BISC_ga_wide %>%
  mutate(
    delta_v1_v2 = as.numeric(difftime(bl_date.extr_m_32w, bl_date.extr_m_12w, units="days"))/7,
    delta_v2_v3 = as.numeric(difftime(bl_col.date_m_0y, bl_date.extr_m_32w, units="days"))/7,
    delta_v1_v3 = as.numeric(difftime(bl_col.date_m_0y, bl_date.extr_m_12w, units="days"))/7,
    delta_v3_v4 = as.numeric(difftime(extraction_date, bl_col.date_m_0y, units="days"))/7
  )

# =========================================================
# 4. GA RECONSTRUCTION (SAFE ORDERED LOGIC)
# =========================================================

BISC_ga_wide <- BISC_ga_wide %>%
  mutate(

    # -----------------------------
    # V1
    # -----------------------------
    ga_v1 = case_when(
      !is.na(bl_gest.age.extr_m_12w) ~ bl_gest.age.extr_m_12w,
      !is.na(ga_v3) & !is.na(delta_v1_v3) ~ ga_v3 - delta_v1_v3,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),

    # -----------------------------
    # V2 (32w)
    # -----------------------------
    ga_v2 = case_when(
      !is.na(bl_gest.age.extr_m_32w) ~ bl_gest.age.extr_m_32w,
      !is.na(ga_v1) & !is.na(delta_v1_v2) ~ ga_v1 + delta_v1_v2,
      !is.na(ga_v3) & !is.na(delta_v2_v3) ~ ga_v3 - delta_v2_v3,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),

    # -----------------------------
    # V3 already defined
    # -----------------------------
    ga_v3 = ga_v3,

    # -----------------------------
    # V4
    # -----------------------------
    ga_v4 = case_when(
      !is.na(gestage_4y_weeks) ~ gestage_4y_weeks,
      !is.na(ga_v3) & !is.na(delta_v3_v4) ~ ga_v3 + delta_v3_v4,
      !is.na(ga_v2) & !is.na(delta_v2_v3) & !is.na(delta_v3_v4) ~ ga_v2 + delta_v2_v3 + delta_v3_v4,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    )
  ) %>%
  select(id_bisc, ga_v1, ga_v2, ga_v3, ga_v4)

# =========================================================
# 5. LONG FORMAT
# =========================================================

#ga_long <- BISC_ga_wide %>%
#  pivot_longer(
#    cols = starts_with("ga_v"),
#    names_to = "visit",
#    values_to = "GA_weeks"
#  ) %>%
#  mutate(
#    visit = recode(visit,
#                   ga_v1 = "v1 (12w)",
#                   ga_v2 = "v2 (32w)",
#                   ga_v3 = "v3 (birth)",
#                   ga_v4 = "v4 (4y)")
#  )

# =========================================================
# 6. SAVE FILE
# =========================================================


long_df <- biomarkers_wide %>%
  mutate(Visit = factor(Visit, levels = sort(unique(Visit)))) %>%
  rename(id_bisc = Participant_ID) %>%
  distinct(id_bisc, Visit, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%

  # join clinical data
  left_join(BISC, by = "id_bisc") %>%

  # JOIN GA (THIS WAS MISSING)
  left_join(
    BISC_ga_wide,
    by = "id_bisc"
  ) %>%

  # create single GA variable for long format
  mutate(
    GA_weeks = case_when(
      Visit == "v1" ~ ga_v1,
      Visit == "v2" ~ ga_v2,
      Visit == "v3" ~ ga_v3,
      Visit == "v4" ~ ga_v4,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    )
  )

#write.xlsx(
#  long_df,
#  "C:/Users/U127925/Desktop/FLH/Analyses/External/BISC - 05032026/save_folder/long_ga.xlsx",
#  overwrite = TRUE
#)
```

```{r GA CREATION, results='hide', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, include=FALSE}
vars_to_check <- c(
  "eco_fur_12w_m",
  "bl_date.extr_m_12w",
  "bl_date.extr_m_32w",
  "bl_col.date_m_0y",
  "extraction_date",
  "bl_gest.age.extr_m_12w",
  "bl_gest.age.extr_m_32w",
  "bl_gest.age.del_m_0y",
  "gestage_4y_weeks"
)

#str(vars_to_check)
#head(BISC$eco_fur_12w_m)
#head(BISC$bl_date.extr_m_12w)
#head(BISC$bl_date.extr_m_32w)
#head(BISC$bl_col.date_m_0y)
#head(BISC$extraction_date)
#head(BISC$bl_gest.age.extr_m_12w)
#head(BISC$bl_gest.age.extr_m_32w)
#head(BISC$bl_gest.age.del_m_0y)
#head(BISC$gestage_4y_weeks)

# =========================================================
# GA QUALITY CONTROL + RECALCULATION FROM DATES
# =========================================================

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(lubridate)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(purrr)

# =========================================================
# 1. PREP DATA
# =========================================================

ga_compare <- BISC %>%
  mutate(
    id_bisc = as.character(id_bisc),

    # -----------------------------------------------------
    # DATE VARIABLES
    # -----------------------------------------------------
    eco_fur_12w_m      = ymd(eco_fur_12w_m),

    bl_date.extr_m_12w = ymd(bl_date.extr_m_12w),
    bl_date.extr_m_32w = ymd(bl_date.extr_m_32w),
    bl_col.date_m_0y   = ymd(bl_col.date_m_0y),
    extraction_date    = ymd(extraction_date),

    # -----------------------------------------------------
    # ORIGINAL GA VARIABLES
    # (convert difftime safely to numeric weeks)
    # -----------------------------------------------------
    bl_gest.age.extr_m_12w =
      as.numeric(bl_gest.age.extr_m_12w),

    bl_gest.age.extr_m_32w =
      as.numeric(bl_gest.age.extr_m_32w),

    bl_gest.age.del_m_0y =
      as.numeric(bl_gest.age.del_m_0y),

    gestage_4y_weeks =
      as.numeric(gestage_4y_weeks)
  )

# =========================================================
# 2. QC TABLE
# =========================================================

qc_table <- map_dfr(vars_to_check, function(v){

  x <- ga_compare[[v]]

  tibble(
    variable = v,
    class = class(x)[1],

    example_1 = as.character(x[1]),
    example_2 = as.character(x[2]),
    example_3 = as.character(x[3]),

    n_missing = sum(is.na(x)),
    n_filled  = sum(!is.na(x))
  )
})

cat("<h3>QC of date and GA variables</h3>")

qc_table %>%
  kable("html") %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)

# =========================================================
# 3. CALCULATE GA FROM DATES
# =========================================================
# Formula:
# GA = (visit_date - FUR_date)/7
# FUR = gestational week 0
# =========================================================

ga_compare <- ga_compare %>%
  mutate(

    # -----------------------------
    # GA FROM DATES
    # -----------------------------
    GA_fromdates_v1 =
      as.numeric(
        difftime(
          bl_date.extr_m_12w,
          eco_fur_12w_m,
          units = "days"
        )
      ) / 7,

    GA_fromdates_v2 =
      as.numeric(
        difftime(
          bl_date.extr_m_32w,
          eco_fur_12w_m,
          units = "days"
        )
      ) / 7,

    GA_fromdates_v3 =
      as.numeric(
        difftime(
          bl_col.date_m_0y,
          eco_fur_12w_m,
          units = "days"
        )
      ) / 7,

    GA_fromdates_v4 =
      as.numeric(
        difftime(
          extraction_date,
          eco_fur_12w_m,
          units = "days"
        )
      ) / 7
  )

# =========================================================
# 4. RECREATE THE PREVIOUS RECONSTRUCTED GA
# =========================================================

ga_compare <- ga_compare %>%
  mutate(

    # anchor
    ga_v3 = case_when(
      !is.na(bl_gest.age.del_m_0y) ~ bl_gest.age.del_m_0y,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),

    ga_v4 = gestage_4y_weeks,

    # time deltas
    delta_v1_v2 =
      as.numeric(
        difftime(
          bl_date.extr_m_32w,
          bl_date.extr_m_12w,
          units = "days"
        )
      ) / 7,

    delta_v2_v3 =
      as.numeric(
        difftime(
          bl_col.date_m_0y,
          bl_date.extr_m_32w,
          units = "days"
        )
      ) / 7,

    delta_v1_v3 =
      as.numeric(
        difftime(
          bl_col.date_m_0y,
          bl_date.extr_m_12w,
          units = "days"
        )
      ) / 7,

    delta_v3_v4 =
      as.numeric(
        difftime(
          extraction_date,
          bl_col.date_m_0y,
          units = "days"
        )
      ) / 7
  )

# =========================================================
# 5. RECONSTRUCTED GA
# =========================================================

ga_compare <- ga_compare %>%
  mutate(

    # V1
    GA_weeks_v1 = case_when(
      !is.na(bl_gest.age.extr_m_12w) ~
        bl_gest.age.extr_m_12w,

      !is.na(ga_v3) &
        !is.na(delta_v1_v3) ~
        ga_v3 - delta_v1_v3,

      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),

    # V2
    GA_weeks_v2 = case_when(
      !is.na(bl_gest.age.extr_m_32w) ~
        bl_gest.age.extr_m_32w,

      !is.na(GA_weeks_v1) &
        !is.na(delta_v1_v2) ~
        GA_weeks_v1 + delta_v1_v2,

      !is.na(ga_v3) &
        !is.na(delta_v2_v3) ~
        ga_v3 - delta_v2_v3,

      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),

    # V3
    GA_weeks_v3 = ga_v3,

    # V4
    GA_weeks_v4 = case_when(
      !is.na(gestage_4y_weeks) ~
        gestage_4y_weeks,

      !is.na(ga_v3) &
        !is.na(delta_v3_v4) ~
        ga_v3 + delta_v3_v4,

      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    )
  )

# =========================================================
# 6. LONG COMPARISON TABLE
# =========================================================

ga_long_compare <- ga_compare %>%
  select(
    id_bisc,

    # original
    bl_gest.age.extr_m_12w,
    bl_gest.age.extr_m_32w,
    bl_gest.age.del_m_0y,
    gestage_4y_weeks,

    # from dates
    starts_with("GA_fromdates"),

    # reconstructed
    starts_with("GA_weeks")
  ) %>%

  pivot_longer(
    cols = -id_bisc,
    names_to = "variable",
    values_to = "value"
  ) %>%

  mutate(
    visit = case_when(
      grepl("v1|12w", variable) ~ "v1",
      grepl("v2|32w", variable) ~ "v2",
      grepl("v3|0y", variable)  ~ "v3",
      grepl("v4|4y", variable)  ~ "v4"
    ),

    type = case_when(
      grepl("^bl_gest", variable) ~ "GA_original",
      grepl("^gestage", variable) ~ "GA_original",
      grepl("^GA_fromdates", variable) ~ "GA_fromdates",
      grepl("^GA_weeks", variable) ~ "GA_reconstructed"
    )
  ) %>%

  select(id_bisc, visit, type, value) %>%

  pivot_wider(
    names_from = type,
    values_from = value
  )

# =========================================================
# 7. MISSINGNESS SUMMARY
# =========================================================

summary_missing <- ga_long_compare %>%
  group_by(visit) %>%
  summarise(

    original_filled =
      sum(!is.na(GA_original)),

    original_missing =
      sum(is.na(GA_original)),

    fromdates_filled =
      sum(!is.na(GA_fromdates)),

    fromdates_missing =
      sum(is.na(GA_fromdates)),

    reconstructed_filled =
      sum(!is.na(GA_reconstructed)),

    reconstructed_missing =
      sum(is.na(GA_reconstructed)),

    .groups = "drop"
  )

cat("<h3>Missingness summary</h3>")

summary_missing %>%
  kable("html") %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)

# =========================================================
# 8. DIFFERENCES
# =========================================================
# threshold = 1 week
# =========================================================

diff_cases <- ga_long_compare %>%
  mutate(

    diff_original_vs_dates =
      abs(GA_original - GA_fromdates),

    diff_original_vs_reconstructed =
      abs(GA_original - GA_reconstructed)
  ) %>%

  filter(
    diff_original_vs_dates > 1 |
    diff_original_vs_reconstructed > 1
  ) %>%

  arrange(id_bisc, visit)

cat("<h3>Cases with GA discrepancies (>1 week)</h3>")

diff_cases %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), round, 2)) %>%
  kable("html") %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)

# =========================================================
# 9. OPTIONAL: VIEW COUNTS
# =========================================================

cat("<h3>Number of discrepant cases</h3>")

table(diff_cases$visit) %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  kable("html") %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)
```


```{r GA CREATION2, results='hide', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, include=FALSE}
# APPLY CHANGES
long_df <- long_df %>%
  mutate(
    GA_weeks = case_when(

      # -----------------------------------------
      # FIX 1
      # -----------------------------------------
      id_bisc == "10010411" & Visit == "v1" ~ 22.6,

      # -----------------------------------------
      # FIX 2
      # -----------------------------------------
      id_bisc == "12005511" & Visit == "v2" ~ 29.4,

      # -----------------------------------------
      # OTHERWISE KEEP ORIGINAL
      # -----------------------------------------
      TRUE ~ GA_weeks
    )
  )

long_df %>%
  filter(
    (id_bisc == "10010411" & Visit == "v1") |
    (id_bisc == "12005511" & Visit == "v2")
  ) %>%
  select(id_bisc, Visit, GA_weeks)

# QC
ga_fill_summary <- ga_compare %>%
  summarise(
    v1 = sum(!is.na(GA_weeks_v1)),
    v2 = sum(!is.na(GA_weeks_v2)),
    v3 = sum(!is.na(GA_weeks_v3)),
    v4 = sum(!is.na(GA_weeks_v4))
  ) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = everything(),
    names_to = "Visit",
    values_to = "Filled_GA_weeks"
  ) %>%
  arrange(Visit)

ga_fill_summary %>%
  kable("html", caption = "Filled GA_weeks per visit") %>%
  kable_styling(
    full_width = FALSE,
    bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed", "responsive")
  ) %>%
  column_spec(1, bold = TRUE)

```


### 2.1. Biomarker trajectories {.tabset}

<span style="color:#2E8B57; font-weight:bold;">
Do biomarker levels differ across pregnancy and post-partum?
</span>

#### Plots {.tabset}

<span style=font-weight:bold;">
VISITS AND GESTATIONAL AGE
</span>

```{r ga plotall, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis'}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

long_df %>%
  mutate(Visit = factor(Visit, levels = c("v1","v2","v3","v4"))) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = GA_weeks, y = 0, color = Visit)) +
  geom_jitter(height = 0.2, alpha = 0.6, size = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~Visit, scales = "free_x") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
  "v1" = "#9ecae1",  # light blue
  "v2" = "#3182bd",  # medium blue
  "v3" = "#31a354",  # green
  "v4" = "#006d2c"   # dark green
  )) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "GA_weeks distribution within each Visit",
    x = "GA_weeks",
    y = NULL
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "none"
  )

long_df %>%
  mutate(Visit = factor(Visit, levels = c("v1","v2","v3","v4"))) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = GA_weeks, y = Visit, color = Visit)) +
  geom_jitter(height = 0.15, alpha = 0.6, size = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
  "v1" = "#9ecae1",  # light blue
  "v2" = "#3182bd",  # medium blue
  "v3" = "#31a354",  # green
  "v4" = "#006d2c"   # dark green
  )) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "GA_weeks vs Visit (all observations)",
    x = "GA_weeks",
    y = "Visit",
    color = "Visit"
  )

```
_______________________________________________________________________________________________________

<span style=font-weight:bold;">
BIOMARKERS: BY VISIT
</span>


```{r ga plotall2, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis'}
bio_colors <- c(
  "log_pTau217" = "#1b9e77",  # green
  "log_NFL"     = "#d95f02",  # orange
  "log_GFAP"    = "#7570b3"   # purple
)

plot_biomarker_visits <- function(df, biomarker){

  df %>%
    mutate(Visit = factor(Visit, levels = c("v1","v2","v3","v4"))) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = Visit, y = .data[[biomarker]])) +
    
    geom_boxplot(
      fill = bio_colors[biomarker],
      alpha = 0.35,
      outlier.alpha = 0.2
    ) +
    
    geom_jitter(
      width = 0.15,
      alpha = 0.5,
      size = 1,
      color = bio_colors[biomarker]
    ) +
    
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(
      title = paste(biomarker, "across visits"),
      x = "Visit",
      y = biomarker
    ) +
    theme(legend.position = "none")
}

plot_spaghetti <- function(df, biomarker){

  ggplot(df,
         aes(x = GA_weeks,
             y = .data[[biomarker]],
             group = id_bisc)) +
    
    geom_line(alpha = 0.3, color = bio_colors[biomarker]) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.5, color = bio_colors[biomarker]) +
    
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(
      title = paste(biomarker, "over gestational age"),
      x = "GA weeks",
      y = biomarker
    )
}

plot_biomarker_visits(long_df, "log_pTau217")
plot_biomarker_visits(long_df, "log_NFL")
plot_biomarker_visits(long_df, "log_GFAP")
```
_______________________________________________________________________________________________________

<span style=font-weight:bold;">
BIOMARKERS DURING ALL STUDY: BY GA
</span>


```{r ga plotall3, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis'}
plot_spaghetti(long_df, "log_pTau217")
plot_spaghetti(long_df, "log_NFL")
plot_spaghetti(long_df, "log_GFAP")
```

_______________________________________________________________________________________________________

<span style=font-weight:bold;">
BIOMARKERS DURING PREGNANCY: BY GA
</span>


```{r ga plotall3 v13, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis'}
long_v13 <- long_df %>%
  filter(Visit %in% c("v1", "v2", "v3")) %>%
  mutate(Visit = factor(Visit, levels = c("v1", "v2", "v3")))
plot_spaghetti(long_v13, "log_pTau217")
plot_spaghetti(long_v13, "log_NFL")
plot_spaghetti(long_v13, "log_GFAP")
```


#### Functional form of biomarker–GA {.tabset}

<span style="color:#2E8B57; font-weight:bold;">
Does the biomarker change linearly with gestational age across individuals?
</span>

_______________________________________________________________________________________________________

**a) AIC**: Lower AIC indicates better model fit. However, with only four timepoints, cubic terms can easily overfit the data and capture noise rather than true developmental structure, so further analyses are needed.

_______________________________________________________________________________________________________

**b) Bootstrap**: Resampling helps showing if the patterns found are consistent. "Sd" shows how much the estimated shape changes when the sample changes slightly. 

- Mean proximal to zero -> shape not supported for the data

- Low sd -> shape is reliable among our population

- High sd -> the shape is not robust

_______________________________________________________________________________________________________

**c) Spline analysis**: To evaluate whether polynomial assumptions were appropriate.

- 1 dominant spline component -> Suggests an approximately linear or gently monotonic relationship.

- 2 dominant spline components -> Suggests a single meaningful curvature (e.g., U-shape or inverted U-shape), consistent with a quadratic-like pattern.

- 3 dominant spline components -> Suggests a more complex trajectory with multiple inflection points within the observed range. This indicates that a simple linear model is insufficient, although with limited timepoints this may also reflect over-flexibility.

_______________________________________________________________________________________________________

**d) Predicted distribution plots**: For each biomarker, predicted trajectories are generated from linear, quadratic, and cubic mixed models across the observed range of gestational age. These plots can be used to (1) visually compare functional forms, (2) assess whether curvature is smooth or driven by extreme values, (3) evaluate consistency with the raw data (“spaghetti plots”), (4) detect overfitting (e.g., unrealistic oscillations in cubic models)

_______________________________________________________________________________________________________

##### Exploring all visits (standard)

```{r quadratic3, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis'}
library(lme4)
library(dplyr)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(splines)
library(broom.mixed)
library(lmerTest)

# -----------------------
# PREP
# -----------------------
data_prep <- function(df){

  df %>%
    mutate(
      id_bisc = factor(id_bisc)
    )
}

# -----------------------
# AIC MODELS
# -----------------------
run_aic_models <- function(data, outcome) {

  f1 <- as.formula(paste0(outcome, " ~ GA_weeks + (1 | id_bisc)"))
  f2 <- as.formula(paste0(outcome, " ~ GA_weeks + I(GA_weeks^2) + (1 | id_bisc)"))
  f3 <- as.formula(paste0(outcome, " ~ GA_weeks + I(GA_weeks^2) + I(GA_weeks^3) + (1 | id_bisc)"))

  m1 <- lmer(f1, data = data, REML = FALSE)
  m2 <- lmer(f2, data = data, REML = FALSE)
  m3 <- lmer(f3, data = data, REML = FALSE)

  tibble(
    Model = c("m1", "m2", "m3"),
    Formula = c(
      paste0(outcome, " ~ GA_weeks + (1 | id_bisc)"),
      paste0(outcome, " ~ GA_weeks + GA_weeks^2 + (1 | id_bisc)"),
      paste0(outcome, " ~ GA_weeks + GA_weeks^2 + GA_weeks^3 + (1 | id_bisc)")
    ),
    df = c(attr(logLik(m1), "df"),
           attr(logLik(m2), "df"),
           attr(logLik(m3), "df")),
    AIC = c(AIC(m1), AIC(m2), AIC(m3))
  )
}

# -----------------------
# BOOTSTRAP
# -----------------------
bootstrap_ga <- function(data, outcome, B = 200){

  ids <- unique(data$id_bisc)
  coefs <- matrix(NA, B, 3)

  for (b in 1:B){

    boot_ids <- sample(ids, replace = TRUE)

    boot_data <- data %>%
      filter(id_bisc %in% boot_ids)

    m <- lm(
      as.formula(paste0(
        outcome,
        " ~ GA_weeks + I(GA_weeks^2) + I(GA_weeks^3)"
      )),
      data = boot_data
    )

    coefs[b, ] <- coef(m)[c("GA_weeks",
                            "I(GA_weeks^2)",
                            "I(GA_weeks^3)")]
  }

  colnames(coefs) <- c("Linear", "Quadratic", "Cubic")

  data.frame(
    Term = colnames(coefs),
    Mean = colMeans(coefs, na.rm = TRUE),
    SD   = apply(coefs, 2, sd, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
}

# -----------------------
# SPLINE MODEL
# -----------------------
fit_spline <- function(data, outcome){

  lmer(
    as.formula(paste0(
      outcome,
      " ~ ns(GA_weeks, df = 3) + (1|id_bisc)"
    )),
    data = data,
    REML = FALSE
  )
}

# -----------------------
# SPLINE INTERPRETATION (NEW ✔)
# -----------------------
spline_table <- function(model){

  td <- broom.mixed::tidy(model, effects = "fixed") %>%
    filter(grepl("ns\\(GA_weeks", term)) %>%
    mutate(
      significance = case_when(
        p.value < 0.001 ~ "***",
        p.value < 0.01 ~ "**",
        p.value < 0.05 ~ "*",
        TRUE ~ "ns"
      )
    )

  return(td)
}

spline_interpretation <- function(spline_tab){

  sig <- sum(spline_tab$significance != "ns")

  if (sig == 0){
    return("Linear / monotonic pattern (no spline components significant)")
  }

  if (sig == 1){
    return("Mostly linear or gently monotonic trend")
  }

  if (sig == 2){
    return("One meaningful curvature (quadratic-like pattern)")
  }

  if (sig == 3){
    return("Complex trajectory or possible overfitting (given limited timepoints)")
  }
}

# -----------------------
# PREDICTIVE PLOTS
# -----------------------
plot_ga_models <- function(data, outcome){

  grid <- data.frame(
    GA_weeks = seq(min(data$GA_weeks), max(data$GA_weeks), length.out = 200)
  )

  m_lin <- lmer(as.formula(paste0(outcome, " ~ GA_weeks + (1|id_bisc)")),
                data = data, REML = FALSE)

  m_quad <- lmer(as.formula(paste0(outcome,
                                   " ~ GA_weeks + I(GA_weeks^2) + (1|id_bisc)")),
                 data = data, REML = FALSE)

  m_cub <- lmer(as.formula(paste0(outcome,
                                  " ~ GA_weeks + I(GA_weeks^2) + I(GA_weeks^3) + (1|id_bisc)")),
                data = data, REML = FALSE)

  grid$linear <- predict(m_lin, newdata = grid, re.form = NA)
  grid$quadratic <- predict(m_quad, newdata = grid, re.form = NA)
  grid$cubic <- predict(m_cub, newdata = grid, re.form = NA)

  grid_long <- pivot_longer(
    grid,
    cols = c(linear, quadratic, cubic),
    names_to = "model",
    values_to = "pred"
  )

  ggplot(grid_long, aes(GA_weeks, pred, color = model)) +
    geom_line(size = 1.2) +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(
      title = paste(outcome, "GA functional form comparison"),
      x = "Gestational age (weeks)",
      y = outcome
    )
}

plot_ga_raw <- function(data, outcome){

  ggplot(data, aes(x = GA_weeks, y = .data[[outcome]])) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.4) +
    geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = TRUE, color = "black") +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(
      title = paste(outcome, "Raw data distribution with LOESS trend"),
      x = "Gestational age (weeks)",
      y = outcome
    )
}
# -----------------------
# FULL PIPELINE (UPDATED ✔)
# -----------------------
run_ga_pipeline <- function(df, outcome){

  df2 <- data_prep(df)

  # ---- AIC ----
  aic <- run_aic_models(df2, outcome)

  print(
    kable(aic, format = "html", digits = 2,
          caption = paste0(outcome, ": AIC comparison of gestational age models")) %>%
      kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)
  )

  # ---- BOOTSTRAP ----
  boot <- bootstrap_ga(df2, outcome, B = 200)

  print(
    kable(boot, format = "html", digits = 6,
          caption = paste0(outcome, ": bootstrap coefficient stability")) %>%
      kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)
  )

  # ---- SPLINE (NEW STRUCTURE ✔) ----
  spline_model <- fit_spline(df2, outcome)

  spline_tab <- spline_table(spline_model)

  print(
    kable(spline_tab, format = "html", digits = 3,
          caption = paste0(outcome, ": spline component significance")) %>%
      kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)
  )

  # interpretation line as table (safe for knitting)
  interp <- data.frame(
    Interpretation = spline_interpretation(spline_tab)
  )

  print(
    kable(interp, format = "html",
          caption = paste0(outcome, ": spline interpretation")) %>%
      kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)
  )

  # ---- PLOT ----
  print(plot_ga_models(df2, outcome))
  
    # ---- RAW DISTRIBUTION PLOT ----
  print(plot_ga_raw(df2, outcome))
}


# -----------------------
# RUN MODELS
# -----------------------
run_ga_pipeline(long_df, "log_pTau217")
run_ga_pipeline(long_df, "log_NFL")
run_ga_pipeline(long_df, "log_GFAP")
```

_______________________________________________________________________________________________________


**CONCLUSION (v1-v4)**

**pTau217** --> Probably **Quadratic model**

 `log_pTau217 ~ GA_weeks + I(GA_weeks^2) + (1 | id_bisc)`

**NFL** --> Probably **Cubic model**

 `log_NFL ~ GA_weeks + I(GA_weeks^2) + I(GA_weeks^3) + (1 | id_bisc)`

**GFAP** --> Probably **Cubic model**

 `log_GFAP ~ GA_weeks + I(GA_weeks^2) + I(GA_weeks^3) + (1 | id_bisc)`

 
##### Exploring all visits (piecewise)

```{r piecewise, results='hide', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, include=FALSE}
long_df <- long_df %>%
  mutate(
    post_birth = ifelse(Visit == "v4", 1, 0)
  )
long_df <- long_df %>%
  mutate(
    GA_pre  = ifelse(post_birth == 0, GA_weeks, max(GA_weeks[Visit != "v4"], na.rm=TRUE)),
    
    GA_post = ifelse(post_birth == 1,
                     GA_weeks - max(GA_weeks[Visit != "v4"], na.rm=TRUE),
                     0)
  )
m_piece <- lmer(
  log_GFAP ~ GA_pre + GA_post + (1 | id_bisc),
  data = long_df
)
m_piece



library(splines)

m_spline <- lmer(
  log_GFAP ~ ns(GA_weeks, knots = 40) + (1|id_bisc),
  data = long_df
)
m_spline
```
```{r testspliness, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis'}
########################### SELECT THE BEST KNOT
compare_knots <- function(df, biomarker, knots = c(34, 36, 38, 40, 42, 44)) {

  library(lme4)
  library(splines)
  library(dplyr)
  library(knitr)
  library(kableExtra)

  df <- df %>%
    mutate(id_bisc = factor(id_bisc))

  # -----------------------------
  # FIT MODELS
  # -----------------------------
  models <- lapply(knots, function(k) {

    fml <- as.formula(
      paste0(
        biomarker,
        " ~ ns(GA_weeks, knots = ", k, ") + (1 | id_bisc)"
      )
    )

    lmer(fml, data = df, REML = FALSE)
  })

  # -----------------------------
  # TABLE
  # -----------------------------
  tab <- data.frame(
    knot = knots,
    AIC = sapply(models, AIC),
    BIC = sapply(models, BIC),
    logLik = sapply(models, logLik)
  ) %>%
    arrange(AIC)

  # -----------------------------
  # HTML OUTPUT
  # -----------------------------
  cat("Biomarker:", biomarker, "\n\n")

  print(
    tab %>%
      mutate(logLik = round(as.numeric(logLik), 2)) %>%
      kable(
        format = "html",
        digits = 2,
        caption = paste0(
          biomarker,
          ": spline knot comparison (GA functional form)"
        )
      ) %>%
      kable_styling(
        full_width = FALSE,
        bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed", "responsive")
      ) %>%
      row_spec(0, bold = TRUE)
  )

  invisible(list(models = models, table = tab))
}
compare_knots(long_df, "log_pTau217")
compare_knots(long_df, "log_NFL")
compare_knots(long_df, "log_GFAP")
```

They are similar, let's use 40 weeks as a knot, since it's the most normal value for birth and biologically meaningful.

```{r testspliness PTAU217, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis'}
################################################## COMPARE MODELS
compare_ga_models <- function(df, biomarker, knot = 40){

  library(lme4)
  library(lmerTest)
  library(splines)
  library(dplyr)
  library(knitr)
  library(kableExtra)

  # -----------------------------
  # PREP
  # -----------------------------
  df <- df %>%
    mutate(id_bisc = factor(id_bisc))

  # -----------------------------
  # MODELS
  # -----------------------------
  f_linear <- as.formula(paste0(biomarker, " ~ GA_weeks + (1 | id_bisc)"))
  f_quadratic <- as.formula(paste0(biomarker, " ~ GA_weeks + I(GA_weeks^2) + (1 | id_bisc)"))
  f_cubic <- as.formula(paste0(biomarker, " ~ GA_weeks + I(GA_weeks^2) + I(GA_weeks^3) + (1 | id_bisc)"))
  f_spline <- as.formula(paste0(biomarker, " ~ ns(GA_weeks, knots = ", knot, ") + (1 | id_bisc)"))

  m_linear <- lmer(f_linear, data = df, REML = FALSE)
  m_quadratic <- lmer(f_quadratic, data = df, REML = FALSE)
  m_cubic <- lmer(f_cubic, data = df, REML = FALSE)
  m_spline <- lmer(f_spline, data = df, REML = FALSE)

  # -----------------------------
  # TABLE
  # -----------------------------
  tab <- tibble(
    Model = c("Linear","Quadratic","Cubic", paste0("Spline (knot = ", knot, ")")),

    Formula = c(
      paste(deparse(f_linear), collapse = " "),
      paste(deparse(f_quadratic), collapse = " "),
      paste(deparse(f_cubic), collapse = " "),
      paste(deparse(f_spline), collapse = " ")
    ),

    AIC = c(AIC(m_linear), AIC(m_quadratic), AIC(m_cubic), AIC(m_spline)),
    BIC = c(BIC(m_linear), BIC(m_quadratic), BIC(m_cubic), BIC(m_spline)),
    logLik = c(logLik(m_linear), logLik(m_quadratic), logLik(m_cubic), logLik(m_spline))
  ) %>%
    arrange(AIC)

  # -----------------------------
  # OUTPUT (ONLY ONCE)
  # -----------------------------
  cat("Biomarker:", biomarker, "\n\n")

  print(
    tab %>%
      mutate(logLik = round(as.numeric(logLik), 2)) %>%
      kable(
        format = "html",
        digits = 2,
        caption = paste0(
          biomarker,
          ": comparison of gestational age functional forms"
        )
      ) %>%
      kable_styling(
        full_width = FALSE,
        bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed", "responsive")
      ) %>%
      row_spec(0, bold = TRUE)
  )

  invisible(list(
    linear = m_linear,
    quadratic = m_quadratic,
    cubic = m_cubic,
    spline = m_spline,
    table = tab
  ))
}
compare_ga_models(long_df, "log_pTau217", knot = 40)
```

```{r testspliness NFL, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis'}
compare_ga_models(long_df, "log_NFL", knot = 40)
```

```{r testspliness GFAP, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis'}
compare_ga_models(long_df, "log_GFAP", knot = 40)
```

**CONCLUSION (v1-v4, piecewise model)**

**pTau217** --> Probably **Cubic model**

 `log_pTau217 ~ GA_weeks + I(GA_weeks^2) + I(GA_weeks^3) + (1 | id_bisc)`

**NFL** --> Probably **Cubic model**

 `log_NFL ~ GA_weeks + I(GA_weeks^2) + I(GA_weeks^3) + (1 | id_bisc)`

**GFAP** --> Probably **Cubic model**

 `log_GFAP ~ GA_weeks + I(GA_weeks^2) + I(GA_weeks^3) + (1 | id_bisc)`


##### Exploring pregnancy only

```{r pregnancy only polynom, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis'}
run_ga_pipeline(long_v13, "log_pTau217")
run_ga_pipeline(long_v13, "log_NFL")
run_ga_pipeline(long_v13, "log_GFAP")
```

**CONCLUSION (v1-v3, during pregnancy)**

**pTau217** --> Probably **Quadratic model**

 `log_pTau217 ~ GA_weeks + I(GA_weeks^2) + (1 | id_bisc)`

**NFL** --> Probably **Cubic model**

 `log_NFL ~ GA_weeks + I(GA_weeks^2) + I(GA_weeks^3) + (1 | id_bisc)`

**GFAP** --> Probably **Quadratic model**

 `log_GFAP ~ GA_weeks + I(GA_weeks^2) + (1 | id_bisc)`
 


#### Analyses {.tabset}

<span style="color:#2E8B57; font-weight:bold; font-size:1.05em;">
Model 1: Do biomarker levels differ across pregnancy and postpartum visits?
</span>

**Results**:

- **pTau217:** Yes. 
Biomarker levels were significantly lower at V3 (birth) compared with V1 and V2 (pregnancy), and significantly increased again at V4 (post-partum), suggesting a transient decrease around delivery followed by postpartum recovery/stabilization.

- **NfL:** Yes. 
Biomarker levels were significantly higher at V3 (birth) compared with V1 and V2 (pregnancy), and significantly decreased at V4 (post-partum), indicating an increase around delivery followed by postpartum stabilization.

- **GFAP:** Yes. 
Biomarker levels were significantly higher at V3 (birth) compared with V1 and V2 (pregnancy), and significantly decreased at V4 (post-partum), indicating an increase around delivery followed by postpartum stabilization.

<span style="color:#2E8B57; font-weight:bold;">
Model 2: Do biomarker levels differ during pregnancy?
</span>

**Results**:

- **pTau217:** Yes. 
pTau217 changes significantly across gestation during pregnancy (V1–V3), following a nonlinear (quadratic) trajectory.

- **NfL:** Yes. 
NfL changes significantly across gestation during pregnancy (V1–V3), following a nonlinear (cubic) trajectory.

- **GFAP:** Yes. 
GFAP changes significantly across gestation during pregnancy (V1–V3), following a nonlinear (quadratic) trajectory.

##### pTau217 {.tabset}

```{r ga ptau217, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis'}
run_biomarker_time <- function(df, bio){

  library(dplyr)
  library(lme4)
  library(lmerTest)
  library(broom.mixed)
  library(kableExtra)
  library(emmeans)

  df <- df %>%
    mutate(
      Visit = factor(Visit, levels = c("v1","v2","v3","v4")),
      id_bisc = factor(id_bisc)
    )

  # -----------------------------
  # MODEL 1: VISIT MODEL
  # -----------------------------
  m_visit <- lmer(
    as.formula(paste0(bio, " ~ Visit + (1 | id_bisc)")),
    data = df,
    REML = TRUE
  )

  em_visit <- emmeans(m_visit, ~ Visit)

  visit_pairs <- pairs(em_visit) %>%
    as.data.frame() %>%
    mutate(
      p_fmt = ifelse(p.value < 0.001, "<0.001",
                     sprintf("%.3f", p.value)),
      signif = case_when(
        p.value < 0.001 ~ "***",
        p.value < 0.01 ~ "**",
        p.value < 0.05 ~ "*",
        TRUE ~ ""
      )
    )

  # =========================================================
  # MODEL 2a: PREGNANCY ONLY (v1-v3)
  # =========================================================

  df_preg <- df %>%
    filter(Visit %in% c("v1", "v2", "v3"))

  if (bio == "log_NFL") {
    fml_preg <- as.formula(
      paste0(bio, " ~ GA_weeks + I(GA_weeks^2) + I(GA_weeks^3) + (1 | id_bisc)")
    )
  } else {
    fml_preg <- as.formula(
      paste0(bio, " ~ GA_weeks + I(GA_weeks^2) + (1 | id_bisc)")
    )
  }

  m_preg <- lmer(fml_preg, data = df_preg, REML = TRUE)

  # =========================================================
  # MODEL 2b: PREGNANCY + POSTPARTUM
  # HIDDEN / DISABLED
  # =========================================================

  # if (bio == "log_pTau217") {
  #   fml_ga <- as.formula(
  #     paste0(bio, " ~ GA_weeks + I(GA_weeks^2) + (1 | id_bisc)")
  #   )
  # } else {
  #   fml_ga <- as.formula(
  #     paste0(bio, " ~ GA_weeks + I(GA_weeks^2) + I(GA_weeks^3) + (1 | id_bisc)")
  #   )
  # }

  # m_ga <- lmer(fml_ga, data = df, REML = TRUE)

  # =========================================================
  # HEADER LABELS
  # =========================================================

  preg_model_label <- if (bio == "log_NFL") {
    "-> Cubic"
  } else {
    "-> Quadratic"
  }

  cat("\n\n")

  cat("**Type**: Longitudinal mixed model\n\n")
  cat("**Dataset**: Complete dataset\n\n")

  # =========================================================
  # MODEL 1 FORMULA
  # =========================================================

  cat("**Model 1: Visit model**\n")

  cat("```r\n")
  cat(deparse(formula(m_visit)))
  cat("\n```\n\n")

  # =========================================================
  # MODEL 2a FORMULA
  # =========================================================

  cat("**Model 2a: Pregnancy GA model (v1–v3)**\n")
  cat(paste0("**", preg_model_label, "**\n\n"))

  cat("```r\n")
  cat(deparse(fml_preg))
  cat("\n```\n\n")

  cat("**──────────────────────────────────────────────**\n\n")

  # =========================================================
  # MODEL 1 TABLE
  # =========================================================

  tab_visit <- broom.mixed::tidy(m_visit, effects = "fixed") %>%
    filter(term != "(Intercept)") %>%
    mutate(
      estimate = round(estimate, 3),
      std.error = round(std.error, 3),
      p_fmt = ifelse(p.value < 0.001, "<0.001",
                     sprintf("%.3f", p.value)),
      signif = case_when(
        p.value < 0.001 ~ "***",
        p.value < 0.01 ~ "**",
        p.value < 0.05 ~ "*",
        TRUE ~ ""
      )
    )

  cat("**Model 1: Visit model - coefficients**\n\n")

  print(
    tab_visit %>%
      select(term, estimate, std.error, p_fmt, signif) %>%
      kable(format = "html",
            col.names = c("Term","Beta","SE","p","Sig.")) %>%
      kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)
  )

  # =========================================================
  # MODEL 1 PAIRWISE
  # =========================================================

  cat("\n\n**Model 1: Visit model - Pairwise comparisons**\n\n")

  print(
    visit_pairs %>%
      select(contrast, estimate, SE, p_fmt, signif) %>%
      kable(format = "html",
            col.names = c("Comparison","Diff","SE","p","Sig.")) %>%
      kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)
  )

  # =========================================================
  # MODEL 2a TABLE
  # =========================================================

  tab_preg <- broom.mixed::tidy(m_preg, effects = "fixed") %>%
    filter(term != "(Intercept)") %>%
    mutate(
      estimate = round(estimate, 3),
      std.error = round(std.error, 3),
      p_fmt = ifelse(p.value < 0.001, "<0.001",
                     sprintf("%.3f", p.value)),
      signif = case_when(
        p.value < 0.001 ~ "***",
        p.value < 0.01 ~ "**",
        p.value < 0.05 ~ "*",
        TRUE ~ ""
      )
    )

  cat("\n\n**Model 2a: Pregnancy GA model (v1–v3) - coefficients**\n\n")

  print(
    tab_preg %>%
      select(term, estimate, std.error, p_fmt, signif) %>%
      kable(format = "html",
            col.names = c("Term","Beta","SE","p","Sig.")) %>%
      kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)
  )

  # =========================================================
  # RETURN
  # =========================================================

  invisible(list(
    m_visit = m_visit,
    m_preg = m_preg
  ))
}

# -----------------------
# RUN
# -----------------------
run_biomarker_time(long_df, "log_pTau217")
```



##### NfL {.tabset}

```{r ga nfl, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis'}
run_biomarker_time(long_df, "log_NFL")
```



##### GFAP {.tabset}

```{r ga gfap, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis'}
run_biomarker_time(long_df, "log_GFAP")
```




### 2.2. Determinants {.tabset}

<span style="color:#2E8B57; font-weight:bold;">
1) Are the determinants associated with the biomarkers at each visit?
</span>

<span style="font-weight:bold;">
Cross-sectional: (v1,v2,v3,v4) 
</span>

`Biomarker ~ Determinant + GA_weeks + (1 | id_bisc)`
 

<span style="color:#2E8B57; font-weight:bold;">
2) Are the determinants associated with the trajectory of the biomarkers during prengnacy? Do determinants modify biomarker trajectories during pregnancy?
</span>

<span style="font-weight:bold;">
Longitudinal - pregnancy: (v1-v3)
</span>
